panels.title: NULL/Zero Values
panels.description: Records with NULL or zero in critical fields

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "Bad Records" FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (open IS NULL OR open = 0 OR high IS NULL OR high = 0 OR low IS NULL OR low = 0 OR close IS NULL OR close = 0 OR volume IS NULL)

panels.title: OHLC Violations
panels.description: Records where high < low or high < open/close

targets.rawSql: SELECT COUNT(*) as "OHLC Errors" FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (high < low OR high < open OR high < close OR low > open OR low > close)

panels.title: Duplicate Records
panels.description: Same symbol + timestamp appearing more than once

targets.rawSql: SELECT COALESCE(SUM(cnt - 1), 0) as "Duplicates" FROM (SELECT symbol, timestamp, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) GROUP BY symbol, timestamp HAVING COUNT(*) > 1) sub

panels.title: Price Anomalies (>10% Intra-Session Jump)
panels.description: Records where price moved >10% within the same trading session

targets.rawSql: WITH ordered AS (SELECT symbol, timestamp, close, date_trunc('day', timestamp) as session_day, LAG(close) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) as prev_close, LAG(date_trunc('day', timestamp)) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) as prev_day FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT COUNT(*) as "Anomalies" FROM ordered WHERE prev_close > 0 AND session_day = prev_day AND ABS((close - prev_close)/prev_close) > 0.10

panels.title: Data Quality Score
panels.description: % of records passing all quality checks

targets.rawSql: WITH total AS (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)), bad AS (SELECT COUNT(*) as cnt FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND (open IS NULL OR open = 0 OR high IS NULL OR high = 0 OR low IS NULL OR low = 0 OR close IS NULL OR close = 0 OR volume IS NULL OR high < low OR high < open OR high < close OR low > open OR low > close)) SELECT ROUND((1 - bad.cnt::numeric / GREATEST(total.cnt, 1)) * 100, 2) as "Quality %" FROM total, bad

panels.title: Volume Outliers (>10x Average)
panels.description: Records with volume exceeding 10x the symbol's average

targets.rawSql: WITH avgs AS (SELECT symbol, AVG(volume) as avg_vol FROM market_data_hot GROUP BY symbol) SELECT m.timestamp as "Time", m.symbol, m.volume as "Volume", ROUND((m.volume / a.avg_vol)::numeric, 1) as "x Avg" FROM market_data_hot m JOIN avgs a ON m.symbol=a.symbol WHERE $__timeFilter(m.timestamp) AND m.volume > a.avg_vol * 10 ORDER BY m.timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Price Anomaly Details (Intra-Session Only)
panels.description: Records where price jumped >10% within the same trading session (cross-session gaps excluded)

targets.rawSql: WITH ordered AS (SELECT symbol, timestamp, close, date_trunc('day', timestamp) as session_day, LAG(close) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) as prev_close, LAG(date_trunc('day', timestamp)) OVER (PARTITION BY symbol ORDER BY timestamp) as prev_day FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)) SELECT timestamp as "Time", symbol, prev_close as "Prev", close as "Close", ROUND(((close - prev_close)/prev_close*100)::numeric, 2) as "Jump %" FROM ordered WHERE prev_close > 0 AND session_day = prev_day AND ABS((close - prev_close)/prev_close) > 0.10 ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Gap Detection — Trading Hours Only (9-15 ICT)
panels.description: Symbols reporting per 5-min bucket during trading hours only

targets.rawSql: SELECT time_bucket('5 minutes', timestamp) as time, COUNT(DISTINCT symbol) as "Symbols Reporting" FROM market_data_hot WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp) AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') >= 9 AND EXTRACT(HOUR FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') < 15 AND EXTRACT(DOW FROM timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'Asia/Ho_Chi_Minh') NOT IN (0,6) GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1
